babyDevelopment: Facial features are distinct. Hair follicles form. The baby can hiccup, stretch, and yawn, though you can't feel it.
bodyChanges: Nausea may finally start to ease up. Your hair and nails might grow faster due to pregnancy hormones.
tips: Plan how to announce your pregnancy

travelAdvisory.note: Travel is safe. Nausea is likely subsiding!

warningSignsToWatch: Bleeding gums (needs a dentist check but usually normal)
milestoneDescription: Your baby's unique face is fully shaped and defined.
